results.name: Germany
results.delta_basis: formula-consistent (77.1 canonical -> 74.9 proposed); vs stored 72.8 the proposed value is numerically higher, see data-hygiene flag
results.key_finding: Most consequential NEW scorable signal this cycle, but sub-threshold. EU return-hubs deal (June 1) is a not-yet-operationalized framework (watch, not scorable). Afghanistan/Syria deportations are of convicted criminals under judicially-supervised frameworks (Amnesty/ECRE contest on non-refoulement). The sharpest signal is continuation of a border-rejection policy a German court ruled EU-law-incompatible (INT/ACC) -- but contested through FUNCTIONING courts, the inverse of India's judicial-override pattern. Conservative downgrade EQU 3.5->3.2, ACC 3.8->3.6, INT 3.5->3.3 = formula-basis 77.1->74.9 (-2.2), below the 5pt threshold and non-band-crossing (stays Established). MATERIAL data-hygiene flag: stored composite 72.8 vs canonical 77.1 (diff 4.3), validator-confirmed warning.

results.name: Meta AI
results.key_finding: Confirm-with-watch at 26.3 under CANDIDATE-INTERNAL-CONSISTENCY-SIGNAL. The MCI program (no-opt-out keystroke/screenshot/clipboard capture of US employees to train AI agents, amid 8,000 layoffs; GDPR-exempt EU) is a real, un-priced I3/B5 labor-privacy harm, but reinforces an already near-floor internal-consistency baseline (INT 1.8, ACC 1.5) rather than revealing new priced-out harm; program is announced/deploying and not yet audited or adjudicated (regulator attention anticipated, not filed). Defensible adjustment <1pt -> sub-threshold, non-band-crossing.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0 (already at the absolute floor, all dimensions 1.0, harm-flag override). New evidence REINFORCES the floor: DoD Chief of Responsible AI (Matthew Johnson) stepped down over unaddressed Grok safety memos; Pentagon classified-systems access granted over reported NSA/GSA concerns; Grok-4 below federal safety/alignment expectations; reported child-sexualized image editing; SE Asia bans (Indonesia/Malaysia/Philippines); Sen. Warren oversight. An entity at 0.0 cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE-SUPPRESSED. 06-02 evidence (BJP West Bengal win + immediate detention-centre order; continued May-June expulsions; 40 Rohingya sea-toss; Gujarat 10,000+ demolitions; USCIRF confirmation) is corroborating continuation of the SAME government-directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime already priced by the pending 2026-06-01 ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT proposal (22.7->15.6, Developing->Critical). No magnitude change; per instruction NO duplicate proposal created. The 06-01 India proposal remains the authoritative pending item, left unmodified.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). WARN final phase: ~30,000 workers in sign-release-or-forfeit through June 15 (13 days out), no renegotiation -- materialization of an already-priced layoff (consistent with EMP 1.2). Remote-reclassification WARN-avoidance theory + NJ state WARN remain FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED -> not scorable. Any adverse WARN adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Mixed-signal confirm at 10.2. DOJ civil+criminal MA-fraud probe confirmed in 10-Q (priced); AI claim-denial class action in discovery; CEO murder trial ongoing. ~50-insurer prior-auth pledge is ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED -> not creditable as an upgrade. Net-neutral against near-floor baseline.

results.name: CVS Health
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.6. FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED re-affirmed: 340B $250M diversion suit (May 21; Mount Sinai/U Kansas/U Michigan; audit refused, agreements terminated) + Tennessee PBM-reform challenge reinforce, not reveal, the near-floor ACC 1.75 / EQU 1.75 profile. Not independently scorable pre-adjudication.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Scale-floor confirm at 2.5. NCRI June 2 brief: Arman Marefati at imminent execution risk; 600+ executions YTD 2026; No-to-Executions-Tuesdays 123rd week; post-Jan-2026-uprising crackdown deepening. Single dominant extremity; does not meet the multi-category 0.0 threshold.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. June lean season: 19.5M food-insecure; 135,000 IPC Phase 5; plan 20% funded; famine confirmed Al Fasher/Kadugli; 14M displaced; third year of war. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR; escalation reinforces but cannot move lower.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 7.8M (56%) acutely food-insecure; 73,300 IPC Phase 5 (+160%); Luakpiny/Nasir at famine risk; IRC Watchlist rank 3; UNSC June briefing; WFP needs $266M. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR (SAF/SPLM-IO access denial); already at absolute floor.

results.name: Democratic Republic of C
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT re-affirmed: Ebola Bundibugyo (321 cases/48 deaths; Uganda spread incl. Kampala; WHO PHEIC; no vaccine) + 26.5M concurrent acute hunger are an exogenous shock revealing priced incapacity, no documented state obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, NOT Republic of Congo).

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Confirm at 50.2. CONSTITUTIONAL-AMENDMENT-AS-EXECUTIVE-REMOVAL re-affirmed: June 1-2 amendment launch (Magyar/Tisza 2/3 majority initiating Sulyok removal via framework law; first constitutional removal in Hungarian history) is materialization of the boundary-watch whose INT-cluster proposal (50.0->50.2) was applied 2026-06-01 and is now the published baseline. No new scorable act; no duplicate proposal.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Net-neutral confirm at 27.5 under MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT-GOVERNANCE. NEGATIVE: DoD classified-deployment guardrails defined by reference to existing law/DoD policy with interpretive discretion resting with the government (weaker than Anthropic's sought contractual prohibitions; Lawfare/TechPolicy.Press) -- candidate INT/BND, not operationalized. POSITIVE/in-progress: Frontier Governance Framework (May 28) aligning with EU GPAI Code + CA frontier law; stated DoD red lines. Both offset; near-floor INT 1.7 already prices the weak posture.

results.name: Perplexity AI
results.key_finding: Confirm at 45.3. FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED re-affirmed: CNN suit (May 28, SDNY; 17,000+ stories) adds to a multi-publisher copyright cluster (NYT, WSJ/Dow Jones, NY Post, Britannica, Merriam-Webster) + privacy class action -- all pre-adjudication. 'You can't copyright facts' is a litigation posture; parallel Time/Gannett licensing deals are a partial mitigant. Reinforces, not reveals, the priced ACC/INT/EQU profile.

results.name: Cohere
results.key_finding: Confirm at 60.9. FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED (advanced): the publisher coalition copyright/trademark suit (Atlantic/Politico/Vox et al.; ~4,000 articles) ADVANCED -- Judge McMahon DENIED Cohere's motion to dismiss (Nov 2025), sustaining substitutive-output and trademark-hallucination theories; case proceeding through June 2026. A motion-to-dismiss denial is a procedural advance, NOT a merits ruling/injunction/liability -> not yet scorable. Leading reassessment trigger of the AI-lab copyright cluster.

methodology_rulings.ruling: New scorable signals assessed and held SUB-THRESHOLD. (1) The June 1 EU return-hubs deal is a not-yet-operationalized policy framework (third-country agreements targeted 'by end of 2026'); under ANNOUNCED-NOT-OPERATIONALIZED it is a watch item, not a scorable act. (2) Deportations to Afghanistan/Syria are of convicted criminals under judicially-supervised, case-by-case frameworks contested by Amnesty/ECRE on non-refoulement grounds -- a real but limited EQU/universality concern. (3) The sharpest signal is the government's CONTINUATION of a border-rejection (pushback) policy that a German court ruled incompatible with EU law -- an INT (I1/I4) and ACC (AB1/AB2) deficit. CRITICALLY, this is contested through FUNCTIONING, independent courts (the inverse of the India judicial-override pattern), so the downgrade is modest: EQU 3.5->3.2, ACC 3.8->3.6, INT 3.5->3.3 = formula-basis 77.1->74.9 (-2.2), below the 5pt threshold and non-band-crossing (stays Established). No change proposal. Distinguished explicitly from ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT (India): functioning rule-of-law check + judicially-supervised, criminal-only deportations vs a directed mass-refoulement regime of UNHCR-registered refugees and citizens.

Meta's MCI program (no-opt-out keystroke/screenshot/clipboard surveillance of US employees to train AI agents, amid 8,000 layoffs; EU-exempt because GDPR prohibits it) is a genuine I3 (internal consistency) and B5 (consent orientation) harm. However it REINFORCES an already near-floor internal-facing baseline (INT 1.8, ACC 1.5) rather than revealing previously-priced-out harm, and is announced/deploying -- not audited or adjudicated (regulator attention anticipated, not filed; symmetric with ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED and FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED). Defensible adjustment <1pt -> sub-threshold, non-band-crossing. Confirm-with-watch. Converts to a scorable INT/BND downgrade on a formal regulatory action or an independent audit establishing scope/harm.

xAI/Grok is published at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dimensions 1.0; harm-flag override). The DoD Responsible-AI chief's departure over unaddressed Grok safety memos, the NSA/GSA-overridden classified-systems access, sub-federal-standard safety/alignment, reported child-sexualized image editing, and the SE Asia bans REINFORCE the floor. An entity at 0.0 cannot move lower; no proposal is possible. Floor confirmation.

06-02 evidence (BJP West Bengal win + immediate detention-centre order; continued expulsions; 40 Rohingya sea-toss; Gujarat demolitions; USCIRF confirmation) is corroborating continuation of the SAME government-directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime already priced by the pending 2026-06-01 ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT proposal (22.7->15.6). No magnitude change. Per instruction, NO duplicate proposal created; the 06-01 proposal remains the authoritative pending item and was left unmodified.

Net-neutral; no dimension move. (For xAI, the contract compounds an already-floored profile rather than offsetting it -- see FLOOR-REINFORCEMENT.)

Reassess on merits adjudication/injunction/settlement.

framing_corrections.correction: Germany's published EQU 3.5 did not price the non-refoulement deportation posture (Afghanistan/Syria), the return-hubs framework, or the continuation of a court-ruled-unlawful border-rejection policy. Assessed this cycle as a modest, conservative EQU/ACC/INT pressure (formula-basis -2.2), explicitly distinguished from the India active-perpetration reweight by the functioning rule-of-law check. Sub-threshold; no proposal. A material stored-composite discrepancy (72.8 vs canonical 77.1) was also identified and logged for data-hygiene reconciliation.

The published ACC 3.5 / EQU 3.0 predate the Nov 2025 motion-to-dismiss DENIAL in the publisher coalition suit. Noted as the leading AI-copyright reassessment trigger; a procedural advance, not yet scorable.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The cycle's most consequential NEW scorable signal -- and the clearest test of the active-perpetration boundary. The EU return-hubs deal (June 1), Afghanistan/Syria deportations, and continuation of a border-rejection policy a German court ruled EU-law-incompatible are real EQU/INT/ACC concerns. But the conduct is judicially supervised and contested through FUNCTIONING courts (the inverse of India's judicial-override pattern) and limited to convicted criminals plus a contested border policy. Conservative downgrade on the formula basis (77.1->74.9, -2.2) is sub-threshold and non-band-crossing (stays Established); no proposal. Separately, a GENUINE math/data-hygiene flag: the stored composite 72.8 does not match the canonical formula output 77.1 (diff 4.3, validator-confirmed) -- logged for reconciliation, index not modified.

Floor confirmation at 0.0 with significant reinforcing evidence: the DoD Chief of Responsible AI stepped down over unaddressed Grok safety memos; Pentagon granted classified-systems access over reported NSA/GSA objections; Grok-4 fell below federal safety/alignment expectations; reports of child-sexualized image editing; SE Asia bans in three countries; Sen. Warren oversight. Already at the absolute floor (harm-flag override), the entity cannot move lower -- the evidence reinforces rather than changes the designation.

Confirm-with-watch at 26.3 introducing the CANDIDATE-INTERNAL-CONSISTENCY-SIGNAL framing: the MCI no-opt-out employee-surveillance program (keystrokes/screenshots/clipboard to train AI agents, amid 8,000 layoffs; EU-exempt under GDPR) is a real, un-priced I3/B5 labor-privacy harm, but reinforces an already near-floor internal-consistency baseline and is announced/deploying -- not audited or adjudicated. Sub-threshold (<1pt). Converts to a scorable downgrade on a formal regulatory action or independent audit establishing scope.

validator_notes: validate-indexes.mjs run: 12749 checks passed, 0 errors, 129 warnings. ONE warning falls among the 20 assessed entities this cycle: Germany (stored composite 72.8 vs canonical formula 77.1, diff 4.3). This is a GENUINE math/data-hygiene discrepancy (the validator uses computeCompositeFromDimensions), NOT a simple-mean false positive -- logged in math_hygiene_flags and data_hygiene_flags; the published index JSON was NOT modified.

All other 19 assessed baselines reconstruct to within the 0.5pt tolerance via computeCompositeFromDimensions (Iran 2.5, Oracle 20.6, DRC 2.3, UnitedHealth 10.2, CVS 25.6, Sudan/South Sudan 0.0, Meta AI 26.2 vs 26.3 diff 0.1, India 23.1 vs 22.7 diff 0.4, Hungary 50.2, OpenAI 27.2 vs 27.5 diff 0.3, Perplexity 45.3, Cohere 60.9, five rotation 48.4) -- no math-hygiene flags.

ZERO change-proposals written this cycle. India suppressed as a duplicate of the pending 06-01 proposal (no magnitude change). Germany scorable but sub-threshold (-2.2 formula basis, non-band-crossing). xAI already at the 0.0 floor (no movement possible). All others confirmed.
ZERO band crossings this cycle. ONE boundary case: Oracle (20.6, 0.6pt above Critical) -- carry-forward, no proposal.
DRC disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, not Republic of Congo).
No change-proposals other than the (none created) 2026-06-02 set were created or modified. The existing backlog and the pending 2026-06-01 India proposal were left as-is.
